misc.title: Imu casually hypetooled 4 conquerors in the Final Saga. Not even Madara had a better introduction!! #ONEPIECE1188
misc.text: Imu casually hypetooled 4 conquerors in the Final Saga. Not even Madara had a better introduction!! #ONEPIECE1188

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1188 It is interesting that Imu still hasn't used his magic book in the fights against either Loki or Luffy. While "Omen" seems to be his standard ability, his magic book is likely his trump
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 It is interesting that Imu still hasn't used his magic book in the fights against either Loki or Luffy. While "Omen" seems to be his standard ability, his magic book is likely his trump card(aside to his full zoan form).

misc.title: Just crazy, before the world cup, dude got lot of hate comments, now everyone is begging him to stop Argentina, the only hope left... Walk and free the world, Dictator Mbappe😭😭😭
misc.text: Just crazy, before the world cup, dude got lot of hate comments, now everyone is begging him to stop Argentina, the only hope left... Walk and free the world, Dictator Mbappe😭😭😭

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1188] If Imu is truly using the other 19 founders weapons, then this would mean he has yet to show his true ability. He would parallel Gilgamesh, with “Gates Of Babylon” Video WorstGenHQ (@W
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1188] If Imu is truly using the other 19 founders weapons, then this would mean he has yet to show his true ability. He would parallel Gilgamesh, with “Gates Of Babylon” Video WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1188 Take a look at the names of the sword attacks Imu used: Nemesis (Blade of Judgment) Gram (Blade of Wrath) Stigma (Blade of Hatred) Void (Blade of?) One after another, I think Imu has a total of 20 different sword skills, each linked to one of the 20 founders of the World Government by using"Omen." It is interesting that Mihawk had an attack in the game called "Void." I could imagine that if Mihawk has a connection to Imu, he might have learned the 20 sword skills of the 20 founders, though, unlike Imu, he executes them with his sword rather than using "Omen." — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2074586379443400866#m

misc.title: 🚨🔴⚫️ AC Milan agree deal to sign Mario Gila from Lazio, here we go! New centre back for Rúben Amorim. Club to club verbal agreement in place after 5 year deal agreed with Gila who asked to leave and
misc.text: 🚨🔴⚫️ AC Milan agree deal to sign Mario Gila from Lazio, here we go! New centre back for Rúben Amorim. Club to club verbal agreement in place after 5 year deal agreed with Gila who asked to leave and join Milan project. 🇪🇸 Real Madrid receive 50% of the deal.

misc.title: 🏝️２巻特典公開🏝️ 『あの島の海音荘』２巻の紙版初版特典は、イラストカード‼️ １巻に続き、『女神のカフェテラス』コラボです☕️ 朝霧島を訪れていたのは、隼と紅葉だけじゃなかった⁉️ 7月16日（木）発売👀 是非チェックしてください🙏 #あの島の海音荘 #女神のカフェテラス
